[[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]<ref name="UK-Date-21">This story is set before "[[Heroes on Both Sides]]," which marks the debut of revamped appearances for several main characters and is dated to the start of [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]] by {{FactFile2014|56|20 BBY 5-8|Negotiation or Militarisation?}}. Considering that the [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] featured in ''[[Star Wars Comic]]'' are published in chronological order, and that "[[Burn the Behemoth!]]" is the first comic in the series to feature the new character models, it can be concluded that this story takes place in approximately [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref>
|series=
|preceded by="[[Spices & Spies]]"
|followed by="[[Burn the Behemoth!]]"
}}
"'''Hunted'''" is a short comic story published in [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic 6.16|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars Comic'' 6.16]].
